assertions.description: fileOperation.sch analyzed in isolation finds only the 19 components physically in that sheet (IC1 CPLD, J1/J4/J5 connectors, U28/U30/U32 level shifters/LDO, 12 decoupling caps) and correctly identifies +3.3V, +1V8, GND as the local power rails — no +5V which belongs to other sheets.
